items.briefing:
Australian organisations are rapidly adopting AI tools, including OpenAI's newly launched ChatGPT Work and GPT-5.6 models now available locally — but security experts warn this rush introduces serious risks. AI gateways and integrations can become high-value targets, potentially giving attackers broad access to sensitive systems and data if not properly secured. Separately, Microsoft has patched a zero-day vulnerability called RoguePlanet, so ensure your Microsoft software is updated promptly.

Before rolling out any new AI tool at work, check with your IT or security team first — unauthorised AI connections to business systems can expose sensitive data without you realising it.

featured.title: ACSC warns of large-scale campaign exploiting CMS vulnerabilities in Australia
featured.quote: ACSC warns of large-scale CMS vulnerability campaign actively targeting Australian organisations.
